steps.title: Interpret the given point
steps.content: The point (6,9) lies on y = f(x). By definition, when x = 6 the corresponding y-value is f(6). Hence, $$ f(6) = 9 $$.

steps.title: Match the result to the choices
steps.content: The computed value is $9$, matching the source choice text 9. That confirms B is correct.
